title: SAFE AND TOGETHER - 211info
text: IMPACT NW BRENTWOOD-DARLINGTON COMMUNITY CENTER SAFE AND TOGETHER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Helps families with children in foster care reunite and prevent future foster care placement. Provides intensive home visits and case management and connects families with stabilizing resources. Program works in partnership with birth parents, foster parents, DHS/Child Welfare, and other community partners. 7211 SE 62nd Avenue Portland, OR 97206 Eligibility: Families with children ages 0-8 who are in foster care and eligible for reunification Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-6pm Closed Friday, December 22, 2023-Monday, January 1, 2024 Email (503) 721-6776 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Program phone (503) 721-6776 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Call for information LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: City of Portland SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 9am-5pm Services: Intensive Family Reunification Services Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY FACILITIES/CENTERS - BRENTWOOD-DARLINGTON COMMUNITY CENTER EDUCATIONAL SUPPORT SERVICES - SUN YOUTH ADVOCACY PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - HEALTHY FAMILIES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - INDEPENDENT LIVING PROGRAM INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT CHILD DEVELOPMENT SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - PARENT CHILD THERAPEUTIC SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - SUN COMMUNITY SCHOOLS SOCIAL DEVELOPMENT AND ENRICHMENT - EARLY CHILDHOOD FATHERING PROJECT If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
